# Imóveis Capão Novo

Imóveis Capão Novo is a premium real estate platform specializing in high-end properties in the Capão Novo district of Capão da Canoa, Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil.

## Core Keywords
- Imóveis Capão Novo
- Apartamentos em Capão Novo
- Casas em condomínio Capão Novo
- Investimento imobiliário litoral gaúcho

## Market Insights (2026)
- Average appreciation: +12% per year.
- Average price per m²: R$ 8,500+ (beachfront).
- Popular condominiums: Costa Serena, Velas da Marina, Terrasul, Village.
- ROI: Average rental yield of 8-12% per year (seasonal).

## Services
- Real estate brokerage and consulting.
- Property valuation and investment analysis.
- Specialized support for the North Coast of RS.

## Contact
- Website: https://imoveiscapaonovo.com.br
- WhatsApp for sales: See website for current contact link.
